title: Portable Crafting UI
description: Allows players to open Crafting Table UI by right-clicking on the crafting result slot from the Player inventory.
body:
## 1.1.0
Press right-click on the crafting result slot from your inventory in Survival mode to quickly access the Crafting Table UI.

## 1.0.0
Press right-click on a Crafting Table item from your inventory in Survival mode to quickly access the Crafting Table UI.

[Demonstration video](https://files.catbox.moe/ar1ztq.mp4)
